title.ko: 선박 또는 그 밖의 물에 뜨는 구조물; 선적을 위한 장치(선박의 환기장치, 난방장치, 냉방장치 또는 공기조화 장치 B63J2/00; 준설선 또는 토양 이동 기계의 지지로서 부유성 하부구조 E02F9/06)
title.en: SHIPS OR OTHER WATERBORNE VESSELS; EQUIPMENT FOR SHIPPING (arrangements of vessel ventilation, heating, cooling, or air-conditioning B63J0002000000;floating substructures as supports of dredgers or soil-shifting machines E02F0009060000)

definition.ko: 선체 유체 역학 또는 유체 정역학 기능 B63B1/00 구조 또는 구성 부품; 조정 가능한 키일(keels); 보호 B63B3/00; B63B41/00; B63B59/00 특정 유형 B63B5/00, B63B7/00 재분; 탱크 청소 B63B11/00; B63B57/00 제조업; 선체 또는 상부구조 개구 B63B15/00; B63B19/00 비움, 밸러스팅; 안정; 안전 B63B13/00, B63B29/16; B63B39/00; B63B43/00 계류, 시프팅; 구명정 B63B21/00; B63B23/00 화물 또는 개인을위한 숙박 시설 B63B25/00, B63B27/00, B63B29/00 신호 또는 조명 장치 또는 해상기구의 배열 또는 조정 B63B45/00, B63B49/00 선박 세부 정보 및 액세서리 B63B17/00 선박 설계 또는 예측 수행 B63B71/00 빌딩 또는 조립 B63B73/00 모니터 속성 또는 작동 매개 변수 B63B79/00 수리 또는 유지 B63B81/00 재건축 또는 보강 B63B83/00 해체 또는 폐기 B63B85/00 부유성 해양 구조물 건물 또는 조립 B63B75/00 부력을 사용하여 현장에서 설치 또는 이송 B63B77/00 수상 스포츠 보드; 그를 위한 부속품 B63B32/00 수상 스포츠 또는 레저에 적합한 선박; 수상 스포츠 또는 레저에 적합한 신체지지 장치 B63B34/00 특정 목적을 위해 적용된 선박 또는 유사한 플로팅 구조물; 그리고 달리 분류되지 않는 것 B63B35/00 부이; 마킹 탐색 경로 B63B22/00; B63B51/00

title.ko: 선체 또는 수중익(水中翼)의 유체역학적 또는 유체정력학적 특징(잠수함 특유의 선체 B63B 3/13; 키일 B63B 3/38)
title.en: Hydrodynamic or hydrostatic features of hulls or of hydrofoils (hulls peculiar to submarines B63B0003130000;keels B63B0003380000)

title.ko: 주로 수위의 변화에 의하여 양력이 유기되는 것(B63B 1/16이 우선)
title.en: deriving lift mainly from water displacement (B63B0001160000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 유체역학적 힘에 의하여 부가 양력이 유기되는 것
title.en: deriving additional lift from hydrodynamic forces

title.ko: 수상 활주형의 것
일개소 이상의 활주면을 갖는 것(B63B 1/22가 우선)
title.en: having more than one planing surface (B63B0001220000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 수중익선 유형의 것(수상 스포츠 보드용 수중익선 B63B32/60; 다른 수상 스포츠 신체 지지 장치용 수중익선 B63B34/40)
title.en: of hydrofoil type   (hydrofoils for water sports boards B63B0032600000;  hydrofoils for other water sports body supporting devices B63B0034400000)

title.ko: 1개 이상의 수중익을 갖는 것(B63B 1/28가 우선)
title.en: having more than one hydrofoil (B63B0001280000 takes precedence)
Other means for varying the inherent hydrodynamic characteristics of hulls
using air bubbles or air layers

title.ko: 구조 또는 구성 요소에 특징이 있는 선체(비금속제의 선체 B63B5/00; 설계,빌딩,보수 또는 수리 방법 B63B71/00~B63B83/00)
title.en: Hulls characterised by their structure or component parts (non-metallic hulls B63B0005000000; designing, building, maintaining or repairing methods B63B0071000000-B63B0083000000)
Hulls built to withstand hydrostatic pressure when fully submerged, e.g. submarine hulls

title.ko: 선체의 부분(장갑선체 B63B 3/10)
외판(재화문 "port" 또는 그것의 폐쇄 B63B 19/00 )

title.en: characterised by being formed predominantly of parts that may be developed into plane surfaces
Means for diminishing external ridges or protrusions

title.ko: 키일 “Keel"(가동형 키일 B63B 41/00 )
빌지키일 "Bilge Keel"(안전익 B63B 39/06)
갑판(판자 대기 B63B 5/06)
격벽 격벽 보강재(수밀도어의 사용 B63B 43/24)
title.en: Bulkheads; Bulkhead reinforcements (arrangements of watertight doors B63B0043240000)
Panellings; Linings, e.g. for insulating purposes
Reinforcements for carrying localised loads, e.g. propulsion plant, guns
Hulls characterised by their construction of non-metallic material
made predominantly of wood with metal reinforcement, i.e. composite construction
made predominantly of concrete, e.g. reinforced
in combination with elements of other materials
with reinforcing members external to shell

title.ko: 접이식, 절첩식, 팽창식 또는 이와 유사한 선박(접이식, 절첩식 또는 팽창식 수상 스포츠 보드 B63B32/53; 접이식, 절첩식 또는 팽창식 카누, 카약 등 B63B34/23; 절첩식 부선 B63B35/36)
title.en: Collapsible, foldable, inflatable or like vessels (collapsible, foldable or inflatable water sports boards B63B0032530000;  collapsible, foldable or inflatable canoes, kayaks or the like B63B0034230000;  foldable pontoons B63B0035360000)

title.ko: 강성 부분만으로 되어 있는 것
구분된 것(분할된 수상 스포츠 보드 B63B32/53; 분할된 카누, 카약 등 B63B34/23)
title.en: sectionalised   (sectionalised water sports boards B63B0032530000;  sectionalised canoes, kayaks or the like B63B0034230000)

title.ko: 강성이 없는 재료로 되어 있는 부분을 갖는 것
팽창 가능한 것 (팽창 가능한 수상 스포츠 보드 B63B32/51; 카누, 카약 등 팽창식 또는 일부분 팽창이 가능한 것 B63B34/22)
title.en: Inflatable   (inflatable water sports boards B63B0032510000; canoes, kayaks or the like being inflatable or having inflatable parts B63B0034220000)

title.ko: 선체의 내부 구획(격벽부의 구조 B63B 3/56)
title.en: Interior subdivision of hulls (bulkhead space construction B63B0003560000)
Arrangement of bulkheads, e.g. defining cargo spaces

title.ko: 연료고 또는 발라스트 탱크의 구조적 특징, 예. 탄성벽을 갖는 것
title.en: Constructional features of bunkers or ballast tanks, e.g. with elastic walls
Conduits for emptying or ballasting; Self-bailing equipment; Scuppers
Ports for passing water through vessels' sides
Superstructures; Arrangements or adaptations of masts
Staying of masts or of other superstructures
Vessels parts, details, or accessories, not otherwise provided for

title.ko: 문, 창, 현창 또는 다른 개구 또는 뚜껑의 장치 또는 설비(배수구 B63B 13/00; 격벽용의 수밀문 장치 B63B 43/24)
title.en: Arrangements or adaptations of ports, doors, windows, port-holes, or other openings or covers (scuppers B63B0013000000;arrangements of watertight doors in bulkheads B63B0043240000)
Windows specially adapted for ships or other waterborne vessels, e.g. clear-view screens or portholes
Air-catching equipment related to windows or port-holes

title.ko: 선박의 현측(舷側)의 재화문 또는 그것에 유사한 개구(선박의 현측(舷側)에 따른 유수를 위한 성문(城門))
title.en: Ports or like openings in vessels' sides (ports for passing water through vessels' sides B63B0013020000)

title.ko: 해치 장치 해치(해치 코오밍 B63B 3/54)

title.en: actuated by cables or the like

title.ko: 계선, 이동, 예선 또는 압선용 장치; 정박(Anchoring) (동적 정박 B63H25/00; 해안, 항구 또는 다른 고정된 해양 구조물에 선적하기 위한 장비, 예. 랜딩(landing) 목적용의 것, E02B)
title.en: Tying-up; Shifting, towing, or pushing equipment; Anchoring (dynamic anchoring B63H0025000000;equipment for shipping on coasts, in harbours or on other fixed marine structures, e.g. for landing purposes, E02B)
Fastening or guiding equipment for chains, ropes, hawsers, or the like
Adaptations of chains, ropes, hawsers, or the like, or of parts thereof
by weight, e.g. flukeless weight anchors
with variable, e.g. sliding, connection to chain
Anchoring arrangements for special vessels, e.g. for floating drilling platforms or dredgers

title.ko: 예항 또는 압항의 장치(예선 B63B35/66; 수상 스포츠용 견인 장치 B63B34/60)
title.en: Towing or pushing equipment (tugs B63B0035660000;towing arrangements for water sports use B63B0034600000)
Adaptations of hooks for towing; Towing-hook mountings
characterised by moving of more than one vessel

title.ko: 수로를 따라서 지상의 통로상을 전진 이동하는 차량 또는 동물에 의해서 선박을 끌거나 밀기위한 장치(보트 후크 또는 그것에 유사한 것 B63B 21/54)
title.en: Equipment for towing or pushing vessels by vehicles or beings moving forward on ground-based paths along water-way (boat-hooks or the like B63B0021540000)
Equipment specially adapted for towing underwater objects or vessels, e.g. fairings for tow-cables

title.ko: 부이(부표, Buoys) (수중물 위치를 지시하는 장치는 B63C 7/26; 구명부이(부표, Buoys), 예. 부환 B63C 9/08)
title.en: Buoys (means for indicating the location of underwater objects B63C0007260000;life-buoys, e.g. rings, B63C0009080000)
specially adapted for mooring a vessel
with means to cause the buoy to surface in response to a transmitted signal
having means to release or urge to the surface a buoy on submergence thereof, e.g. to mark location of a sunken object
Water soluble or water weakened means, i.e. buoy released by buoy-to-object securing means being destroyed on contact with water
the surfacing of the buoy being assisted by a gas released or generated on submergence of the buoy
Buoy-to-object securing means responsive to hydrostatic pressure
specially adapted for marking a navigational route
having means to control attitude or position, e.g. reaction surfaces or tether

title.ko: 가스 발생 수단을 갖는 팽창 가능한 부이 (B63B 22/12가 우선)
title.en: Inflatable buoys with gas generating means (B63B0022120000 takes precedence)
container type, i.e. having provision for the storage of material
having means to selectively release contents, e.g. swivel couplings

title.ko: 구명정 또는 그것에 유사한 것의 조작장치
title.en: Equipment for handling lifeboats or the like
Davits, i.e. devices having arms for lowering boats by cables or the like
with arms pivoting on substantially-horizontal axes, e.g. gravity type
with positive drive of the arms
with arms pivoting on substantially-vertical axes
with rectilinear translation of boat before lowering
Devices for projecting or releasing boats for free fall
Devices for guiding boats to water surface
Rigid guides, e.g. having arms pivoted near waterline
Guiding means for lowering by cables, e.g. for listing ships
Transport of boats to davits or the like

title.ko: 양강 장치의 사용
title.en: Use of lowering or hoisting gear

title.ko: 보트를 취급하는 윈치를 사용한 것

title.en: with control of winches from boat
Additional connections between boat and davit
Fastening or storing of boats on deck
Condition-responsive handling equipment, e.g. automatic release of boat from lowering tackle upon contact with water

title.ko: 화물 수용 장치, 예. 쌓아붙임 또는 적하 배열; 그를 특징으로 하는 선박(낚시 선박 어항 B63B 19/12; 하물을 고르개 나누는 것 이외의 다른 조정, 예; 발라스트의 사용에 의한 것 B63B 43/06, 43/08)
title.en: Load-accommodating arrangements, e.g. stowing or trimming; Vessels characterised thereby (fishing vessel fish holds B63B0035240000;trimming otherwise than by cargo division. e.g. by use of ballast, B63B0043060000, B63B0043080000)
for motor vehicles or the like
Means for preventing unwanted cargo movement, e.g. dunnage

title.ko: 승객 또는 화물의 선적 또는 하역을 위한 선체 장치의 배치, 부착(자동 하역 바지선 또는 거룻배 B65G 35/30; 떠있는 크레인 B66C 23/52)
title.en: Arrangement of ship-based loading or unloading equipment for cargo or passengers (self-discharging barges or lighters B63B0035300000;floating cranes B66C0023520000)
of ramps, gangways or outboard ladders
of conveyors, e.g. of endless-belt or screw-type
for transfer at sea between ships or between ships and off-shore structures

title.ko: 달리 분류되어 있지 않는 승무원 또는 승객의 거주설비
title.en: Accommodation for crew or passengers not otherwise provided for
Cabins or other living spaces; Construction or arrangement thereof
Storm guards on tables, e.g. fiddles
Closet or like flushing arrangements; Washing or bathing facilities peculiar to ships
Arrangements or adaptations of swimming pools

title.ko: 사다리의 장치 또는 설비(침대에 취부된 사다리 B63B 29/10)
title.en: Arrangements or adaptations of ladders (mounting ladders for berths B63B0029100000)

title.ko: 수상 스포츠 보드; 그를 위한 부속품

definition.ko: 이 그룹은 폭에 대하여 얇은 몸체를 갖는 부유 구조물을 다루며, 일반적으로 수상 스포츠 또는 레저에 적합, 예. 서프보드, 윈드서핑 보드, 웨이크보드, 스탠드업 패들[SUP] 보드 또는 수상스키; 그러한 구조의 부속품.

title.ko: 모터 추진 수상 스포츠 보드(동력으로 구동하는 수상 모터사이클 B63B34/10)
title.en: Motor-propelled water sports boards  (power-driven personal watercraft B63B0034100000)

title.ko: 엎드린 자세로 사용하는데 적합한 보드(견인 수상 썰매 B63B34/54)
title.en: Boards specially adapted for use in a prone position, e.g. wild-water sledges  (towed water sledges B63B0034540000)
Bodyboards for surfing; Accessories specially adapted therefor
Water skis fastened to the user’s feet; Accessories specially adapted therefor
Twintip boards; Wakeboards; Surfboards; Windsurfing boards; Paddle boards, e.g. SUP boards; Accessories specially adapted therefor
Boards characterised by their constructional features
Inflatable boards, e.g. drop-stitch inflatable boards
Sectionalised boards, e.g. modular, dismountable or foldable boards
Multihull boards, e.g. of catamaran type
Boards convertible into vessels or other types of water sports boards, e.g. into sailboats, canoes or water-cycles
Boards characterised by the material, e.g. laminated materials

title.ko: 제조 공정에 특징이 있는 보드, 예. 모듈 또는 3차원 [3D] 프린트
title.en: Boards characterised by their manufacturing process, e.g. moulding or three-dimensional [3D] printing
Board appendages, e.g. fins, hydrofoils or centre boards
characterised by the material, e.g. laminated materials; characterised by their manufacturing process
Adjustable, e.g. by adding sections, by removing sections or by changing orientation or profile
Arrangements for fixation to the board, e.g. fin boxes or foil boxes
Mast foot attachments, e.g. mast foot rails
Accessories not specially adapted for a particular type of board, e.g. paddings or buoyancy elements
for tethering users or objects to the board, e.g. leashes
Arrangements for fixation of accessories to the board, e.g. inserts or rails
Arrangements specially adapted for stowing or transporting water sports boards
for stowing, e.g. racks or straps

title.ko: 수상 스포츠 또는 레저에 적합한 선박; 수상 스포츠 또는 레저에 적합한 신체지지 장치(수상 스포츠 보드 B63B32/00; 수영용 장치(framework) A63B35/00; 인력에 의해 작동되는 추진장치 B63H16/00)
title.en: Vessels specially adapted for water sports or leisure; Body-supporting devices specially adapted for water sports or leisure (water sports boards B63B0032000000;swimming frameworks A63B0035000000;propulsion arrangements actuated by muscle power B63H0016000000)

definition.ko: 이 그룹은 사용자의 신체를 지지하고 수면에서 움직이는 부유 구조물을 다루며, 수상 스포츠 또는 레저에 적합

title.ko: 동력 구동하는 수상 모터사이클, 예. 수상 스쿠터 (제트 추진 B63H11/00; 제트에 의한 조타 B63H25/46); 그러한 부속품
title.en: Power-driven personal watercraft, e.g. water scooters   (water jet propulsion B63H0011000000; jet steering B63H0025460000); Accessories therefor
Sectionalised, e.g. modular, collapsible or foldable

title.ko: 카누, 카약 등을 위한 부속품(인력에 의한 추진 B63H16/00; 선외 추진 장치 B63H20/00)
title.en: Accessories for canoes, kayaks or the like (effecting propulsion by muscle power B63H0016000000;outboard propulsion units B63H0020000000)

title.ko: 경주용으로 적합한 조정보트; 그러한 부속품(조정(rowing)에 의해 추진되는 것 B63H16/00)
title.en: Rowing boats specially adapted for racing; Accessories therefor (effecting propulsion by rowing B63H0016000000)
Body-supporting structures dynamically supported by foils under water

title.ko: 신체지지 부력 장치, 예. 수영 보트 또는 수상 자전거 (수영 보조구 A63B31/00)
title.en: Body-supporting buoyant devices, e.g. bathing boats or water cycles (swimming aids A63B0031000000)

title.ko: 견인에 특히 적합한 것, 예. 바나나보트 , 수상썰매 또는 부표견인(견인을 위한 배치 B63B34/60)
title.en: specially adapted for being towed, e.g. banana boats, water sledges or towed buoys  (arrangements for towing B63B0034600000)
for use in a standing position, e.g. water shoes, water walking devices or buoyant skis
Accessories, e.g. sticks for water walking
Arrangements for towing, e.g. for use with water-skis or wakeboards
Holding means for the user, e.g. handle bars or harnesses
Connection means on the towing watercraft, e.g. pylons, side poles or winches
Arrangements on vessels specially adapted for generating waves for surfing, wakeboarding or the like, e.g. ballast tanks

title.ko: 특정 목적을 위해 적용되는 선박 또는 이것에 유사한 부양 구조물
title.en: Vessels or similar floating structures specially adapted for specific purposes and not otherwise provided for
for moving cable-ends from ship to shore
having forced pitching or rolling equipment
for collecting pollution from open water
Floating buildings, stores, drilling platforms, or workshops, e.g. carrying water-oil separating devices

title.ko: 항공기용의 선박 또는 부양 구조물(항공모함 B63G 11/00)
title.en: Vessels or floating structures for aircraft (aircraft carriers B63G0011000000)
Nets, slipways or the like, for recovering aircraft from the water

title.ko: 등선(정박된 등선을 갖는 항로의 표시 B63B 51/02)
title.en: Lightships (marking of navigational route with anchored lightships B63B0051020000)

title.ko: 뗏목, 즉. 흘수선이 앝고, 건현이 없든지 거의 없으며, 사용자를 지지하기 위한 플랫폼 또는 바닥을 갖는 자유롭게 물에 뜨는 구조체(구명 뗏목 또는 유사물 B63C 9/02)
title.en: Rafts, i.e. free floating waterborne vessels, of shallow draft, with little or no freeboard, and having a platform or floor for supporting a user (life-rafts or the like B63C0009020000)
having a platform or floor below the level of the buoyancy means, e.g. suspended basket type
formed from logs or the like

title.ko: 종요(pitching), 횡요(Rolling) 또는 그것에 유사한 바람직하지 않은 선박의 동요 경감 장치 선박의 자세지시장치
title.en: Equipment to decrease pitch, roll, or like unwanted vessel movements; Apparatus for indicating vessel attitude
to decrease vessel movements by displacement of masses
to decrease vessel movements by using gyroscopes directly

title.ko: 수중에서 작동하는 날개를 사용하여 선박의 동요를 경감하는 것(빌지킬의 구조적측면 B63B3/44)
title.en: to decrease vessel movements by using foils acting on ambient water (constructional aspects of bilge keels B63B0003440000)

title.ko: 보조 제트 또는 프로펠러를 작동시켜 선박의 동요를 경감시키는 것(조타 또는 동적정류를 위하여 보조 제트 또는 프로펠러를 사용하는 것 B63H 25/00 )
title.en: to decrease vessel movements by using auxiliary jets or propellers (using auxiliary jets or propellers for steering or dynamic anchoring B63H0025000000)
to decrease vessel movements by damping the waves, e.g. by pouring oil on water
for indicating inclination or duration of roll
Drop keels, e.g. centre boards or side boards

title.ko: 선박의 안전성을 개선하는 것, 예. 손상 제어로서 달리 분류되지 않는 것
title.en: Improving safety of vessels, e.g. damage control, not otherwise provided for

title.ko: 전복 또는 침몰의 위험성을 경감시키는 것(격벽의 수밀문 장치에 의한 것 B63B 43/24)
title.en: reducing risk of capsizing or sinking (by means of watertight doors in bulkheads B63B0043240000)
Temporary equipment for stopping leaks, e.g. collision mats
Arrangements of watertight doors in bulkheads

title.ko: 신호, 조명 기구의 배치 또는 적용(구명부이, 구명벨트, 구명자켓, 구명복 또는 그와 유사한 것, 신호발생 수단에 특징이 있는 것 B63C 9/20)
title.en: Arrangements or adaptations of signalling or lighting devices (life-buoys, life-belts, life-jackets, life-suits or the like, characterised by signalling means B63C0009200000)
the devices being intended to illuminate the way ahead or other areas of environments
the devices being intended to indicate the vessel or parts thereof
the devices being intended to illuminate vessels' decks or interior
Arrangements of nautical instruments or navigational aids
Marking of navigational routes otherwise than with buoys
with anchored lightships; by use of lighthouses
Tank cleaning specially adapted for vessels

title.ko: 선박에 특히 적합한 선체의 보호; 선박에 특히 적합한 청소 장치
title.en: Hull protection specially adapted for vessels; Cleaning devices specially adapted for vessels

title.ko: 선박에 내장된 또는 그에 특히 적합한 방현재; 마찰용 외판(구명보트용 활주 방현재 E02B 3/26)
title.en: Fenders integral with waterborne vessels or specially adapted therefor; Rubbing-strakes (skid fenders for lifeboats B63B0023360000)

title.ko: 선체의 청소 장치
해상에서의 침수선체면의 청소 장치(B63B 59/10이 우선)
title.en: of underwater surfaces while afloat (B63B0059100000 takes precedence)
using trolleys or the like driven along the surface
Equipment for shipping not otherwise provided for
using computer simulation, e.g. finite element method [FEM] or computational fluid dynamics [CFD]
using towing tanks or model basins for designing
Building or assembling vessels or marine structures, e.g. hulls or offshore platforms
Building or assembling vessels from prefabricated hull blocks, i.e. complete hull cross-sections
Building or assembling prefabricated vessel modules or parts other than hull blocks, e.g. engine rooms, rudders, propellers, superstructures, berths, holds or tanks
Moving or transporting modules or hull blocks to assembly sites, e.g. by rolling, lifting or floating
characterised by forming methods, e.g. manufacturing of curved blocks
characterised by the use of specific tools or equipment; characterised by automation, e.g. use of robots
characterised by using moulds; Moulds or plugs therefor
characterised by plastic moulding, e.g. injection moulding, extrusion moulding or blow moulding
Building or assembling floating offshore structures, e.g. semi-submersible platforms, SPAR platforms or wind turbine platforms
Transporting or installing offshore structures on site using buoyancy forces, e.g. using semi-submersible barges, ballasting the structure or transporting of oil-and-gas platforms
specially adapted for electric power plants, e.g. wind turbines or tidal turbine generators
Monitoring properties or operating parameters of vessels in operation
using sensors, e.g. pressure sensors, strain gauges or accelerometers
for monitoring environmental variables, e.g. wave height or weather data
using models or simulation, e.g. statistical models or stochastic models
for diagnosing, testing or predicting the integrity or performance of vessels
for controlling the operation of vessels, e.g. monitoring their speed, routing or maintenance schedules
Rebuilding or retrofitting vessels, e.g. retrofitting ballast water treatment systems
for conversion to a different use, e.g. for converting tankers into a FPSO-FLNG units
for improving energy efficiency, e.g. by improving hydrodynamics or by upgrading the power plant
for reducing risks of pollution or contamination; for improving safety
